pivots: Strategic partnership upgrade with Microsoft Azure (March 2025)
Launch of ReconX Labs for threat intelligence
CEO-led initiative to have 1/3 of business code written by AI by end of 2025
fiscal_signals: Operational focus on 'Cyber Resilience' and metadata-driven security

verdict.why_now: Druva is at a critical inflection point: they've committed to a massive internal AI transformation (33% code target) and a strategic Azure pivot. They need specialized AI agents to manage this transition and scale their market presence without the 'muted' hiring the CEO mentioned.
verdict.catalog_match: Market Intelligence Agent (to scale SDR/Outreach for the new Azure partnership) and Legacy Modernization AI (to support the 1/3rd AI-code initiative).

research_trace: Identified Druva as a top-tier candidate in the Sahyadri region.
Initialized dossier for druva.com focusing on SaaS scalability and AI transformation.
Discovered CEO Jaspreet Singh's 2025 mandate for AI-generated code and the Azure strategic shift.
Mapped signals to 'Legacy Modernization' and 'Market Intelligence' tools in catalog.json.
